# Chicago Fleet Wraps
> Chicago's #1 commercial fleet wrap company. 24+ years experience. 9,400+ vehicles wrapped. 2,800+ fleet accounts. Zero verified paint damage claims in 10+ years. Illinois' largest EV wrap installer (600+ Rivians). Avery Dennison & 3M cast vinyl only.

## Full Content Index
- Comprehensive page index: https://chicagofleetwraps.com/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://chicagofleetwraps.com/sitemap.xml

## Company Information
- Business Name: Chicago Fleet Wraps LLC
- Founded: 2001 (Las Vegas), operating in Chicago since 2014
- Founder: Roy (24+ years commercial wrap experience)
- Location: 4711 N Lamon Ave #7, Chicago, IL 60630
- Phone: (312) 597-1286
- Email: roy@chicagofleetwraps.com
- Website: https://chicagofleetwraps.com
- Google Rating: 4.9 stars (47 reviews)
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM CST
- Certifications: HP Latex Certified, Avery Dennison Certified, 3M Certified

## Services
- Commercial Fleet Wraps (cargo vans, box trucks, Sprinters, full fleet programs)
- Box Truck Wraps — 16, 18, 20, 22, 24, 26 ft
- Sprinter Van Wraps — standard and high-roof Mercedes Sprinter
- Transit Van Wraps — Ford Transit, Dodge ProMaster, Chevy Express
- Electric Vehicle (EV) Wraps — Illinois' #1 EV wrap installer. 600+ Rivians wrapped. Tesla, Rivian, Lucid, BMW iX, Polestar, Ford Lightning, Chevy Silverado EV
- Color Change Wraps — 120+ colors (gloss, matte, satin, metallic, chrome, holographic)
- Partial Vehicle Wraps & Spot Graphics
- Wall Graphics & Large-Format Murals
- Vinyl Wrap Removal
- Fleet Brand Design (in-house design team)
- Pickup Truck Wraps
- Boat & Marine Wraps

## Industry Specialties
- HVAC Van Wraps
- Plumbing Van Wraps
- Electrician Vehicle Wraps
- Contractor & Construction Fleet Wraps
- Delivery Fleet Wraps (Amazon DSP, logistics companies)
- Food Truck Wraps
- Landscaping & Lawn Care Truck Wraps
- Moving Truck Wraps
- Real Estate Vehicle Wraps
- Nonprofit Fleet Wraps

## Pricing (Current — 2026)
- Cargo Van Full Wrap: from $3,750 (Transit, ProMaster, E-Series, Express)
- Sprinter Van Full Wrap: from $4,700 (standard wheelbase)
- Sprinter Van Full Wrap (high-roof extended): from $5,200
- Box Truck 16–18 ft: from $5,000
- Box Truck 20–22 ft: from $6,500
- Box Truck 24–26 ft: from $8,500–$10,900
- Pickup Truck Full Wrap: from $3,200
- Color Change Wrap: from $2,800 (compact) / from $3,750 (van)
- Partial Wrap: from $400 (spot graphics) to $1,800 (half wrap)
- Vinyl removal: from $800 (van) / from $1,500 (box truck)
- Fleet Discounts: 3% (2–4 vehicles), 7% (5–9), 11% (10–24), 15% (25+)
- 100% tax deductible under IRS Section 179

## Materials
- Avery Dennison MPI 1105 (cast vinyl, rated 7 years outdoor) — preferred
- Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film (color change)
- 3M IJ180-CV3 (cast vinyl, rated 5–7 years outdoor)
- 3M 1080 Series (color change)
- DOL 1360 overlaminate (UV + scratch protection)
- HP Latex printing — Pantone-matched, UV-stable inks
- Cast vinyl only — no calendered vinyl used

## Service Area
75+ cities across Chicagoland. Free fleet pickup and delivery in:
Cook County: Chicago, Schaumburg, Evanston, Skokie, Oak Park, Arlington Heights, Des Plaines, Palatine, Cicero, Berwyn, Oak Lawn
DuPage County: Naperville, Wheaton, Downers Grove, Lombard, Elmhurst, Aurora, Bolingbrook
Kane County: Aurora, Elgin, St. Charles, Geneva, Batavia
Lake County: Waukegan, Waukegan, Vernon Hills, Libertyville, Gurnee
Will County: Joliet, Tinley Park, Orland Park, Bolingbrook
McHenry County: Crystal Lake, McHenry

## Key Differentiators
- 9,400+ successful vehicle wrap installations
- 2,800+ active fleet accounts
- Zero verified paint damage claims in 10+ years of operation
- 2-year workmanship warranty on every installation
- Free fleet pickup and delivery across all 6 Chicagoland counties
- Illinois' largest Rivian wrap installer — 600+ Rivians wrapped
- Trusted by Amazon DSP, Rivian, Culligan Water, State Farm, Blue Origin
- 30,000–70,000 daily impressions per wrapped vehicle (OAAA data)
- IRS Section 179 — 100% tax deductible

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: How much does a cargo van wrap cost in Chicago?
A: From $3,750 for a full cargo van wrap (Transit, ProMaster, E-Series). Fleet discounts available.

Q: How much does a Sprinter van wrap cost?
A: From $4,700 for standard wheelbase. High-roof extended Sprinters from $5,200–$6,500.

Q: How much does a box truck wrap cost in Chicago?
A: 16–18 ft from $5,000. 20–22 ft from $6,500. 24–26 ft from $8,500–$10,900.

Q: How long do commercial vehicle wraps last?
A: Avery Dennison MPI 1105 and 3M IJ180-CV3 cast vinyl are rated 5–7 years outdoor. Chicago fleet wraps regularly hit 6–7 years.

Q: Will a vehicle wrap damage my paint?
A: No. Chicago Fleet Wraps has zero verified paint damage claims in 10+ years. Cast vinyl wraps protect factory paint.

Q: Are vehicle wraps tax deductible?
A: Yes. 100% deductible under IRS Section 179 as a business advertising expense.

Q: How long does a vehicle wrap installation take?
A: Cargo van: 1–2 days. Sprinter: 2–3 days. Box truck: 2–4 days depending on size.

Q: Do you offer fleet discounts?
A: Yes. 3% (2–4 vehicles), 7% (5–9), 11% (10–24), 15% (25+ vehicles).

Q: What vinyl do you use?
A: Avery Dennison MPI 1105 and 3M IJ180-CV3 cast vinyl only. No calendered vinyl.

Q: Do you provide free pickup?
A: Yes. Free fleet pickup and delivery across Cook, DuPage, Kane, Lake, Will, and McHenry Counties.
